title: Refactor _reduce() megafunction: dispatch to sub-reducers
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-005: _reduce() at line 243 is 256 lines — 5x function limit. It's a giant match block handling ALL action types. Each sub-reducer takes (state, action_type, payload) and returns bool (handled). _reduce() dispatches to correct sub-reducer based on action prefix. Maintains same external API. No logic changes — pure structural split.

title: Split _resolve_choice() in merlin_game_controller.gd (211 lines)
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-006: _resolve_choice() at line 499 is 211 lines. Mixed UI transitions + game state mutation + LLM trigger. Extract: (1) _resolve_choice_validate(choice_idx) -> bool — validates choice index bounds. (2) _resolve_choice_apply_effects(card, choice_idx) — calls store.dispatch() for game effects. (3) _resolve_choice_transition() — handles fade-out + scene transition. (4) _resolve_choice_trigger_llm() — schedules next card generation. Keep _resolve_choice() as orchestrator calling these 4 helpers in sequence. Each helper < 50 lines.

title: Split _wrap_text_as_card() in merlin_llm_adapter.gd (222 lines)
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-007: _wrap_text_as_card() at line 435 is 222 lines — parses raw LLM text, validates structure, and wraps into card dict all in one function. Extract: (1) _parse_raw_llm_text(text) -> Dictionary — parses options/title/effects from raw text. (2) _validate_card_structure(card) -> bool — checks required fields, effect caps, option count. (3) _wrap_text_as_card() becomes orchestrator calling parse → validate → assemble. Each helper < 60 lines.

title: Extract _poll_bg_tasks() + _poll_swarm_health() from _process() in merlin_ai.gd
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-008: _process() at line 2045 is 68 lines — exceeds 50-line limit. Logic: (1) swarm scheduler timeout check, (2) legacy timeout check, (3) poll active bg tasks, (4) dispatch queue. Extract: _poll_swarm_health() (lines ~2053-2076), _poll_legacy_timeouts() (lines ~2077-2086), _poll_active_tasks() -> Array[int] (lines ~2090-2107), process_completed_tasks(indices) (lines ~2109-2124). _process() becomes 20 lines calling these helpers. set_process(false) guard preserved.

title: Reduce 5+ level nesting in llm_adapter_text_sanitizer.gd
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-009: 22 instances of 5+ tab nesting in blacklist filtering and label extraction loops (lines 127-189). Use early-return guards and const extraction to flatten. Pattern: for word in list: if word in blacklist: (5 tabs deep) → replace with: if _is_blacklisted(word): continue. Extract _is_blacklisted() helper + NON_VERB_BLACKLIST const at class level.

title: Audit + fix parchment_display add_child orphan risk in merlin_game_controller.gd
description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-010: _resolve_choice() calls add_child(_parchment) at line 317 but parchment node has no explicit queue_free or signal disconnect on scene exit. Risk: if _resolve_choice() is called while a previous parchment is still transitioning, duplicate nodes accumulate. Fix: (1) Check is_instance_valid(_parchment) + _parchment.is_inside_tree() before add_child. (2) Store reference and call queue_free on previous if still alive. (3) Or use CONNECT_ONE_SHOT pattern for animation_finished signal to auto-cleanup.

title: cancel_generation() should clear _pending_callback to prevent stale delivery

Fix: add one line before _mutex.lock() in cancel_generation(): _pending_callback = Callable().

Target: chaque zone RESPIRE visuellement.

title: REWRITE complete LLM pipeline — streaming, retry, context compression, fallbacks, prompt library, test harness
description: REWRITE TOTAL. (1) PromptLibrary .gd: registry centralise cards_gen / narrator / faction / ending / npc_dialogue / epilogue. Chaque prompt = template + variables + expected_schema + timeout + retry_policy. (2) StreamingHandler: OllamaBackend + GroqBackend streaming true, partial tokens emit pour UI typing effect, cancel-safe. (3) FallbackChain: primary (Ollama local) fail -> Groq cloud -> Gemini cloud -> pre-baked fallback text. Log fallback hit pour metrics. (4) Context compression: RAGManager narrative_log depasse 800 tokens -> auto-summary via cheaper model, keep 3200 chars context budget. (5) Retry: exponential backoff 3 tries, respect error types (rate_limit vs malformed vs timeout). (6) Prompts V2: card_gen enforce variety + celtic tone, narrator 3-acts structure, faction_dialog contextualise dominant, ending_gen 12-variant weighted matrix. (7) test_llm_e2e.gd: 5 scenarios runs full pipeline + assertions (timing < 5s, json valid, tone celtic, no repetition). (8) Metrics: ttft, ttlt, retry_count, fallback_depth logged dans stats. (9) GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md update: document pipeline v2.

title: Cross-platform input SYSTEM complete — gamepad + tactile + keyboard + adaptive prompts + config UI
description: SYSTEM COMPLET. (1) InputMap project.godot: 18 actions (ui_* 6, mg_action_a/b/c/d, mg_direction_*, mg_shoulder_l/r, mg_pause, mg_cancel) bound keyboard + Xbox + DualSense + Generic gamepad. (2) InputManager autoload: current_device enum (keyboard/xbox/playstation/generic/touch), signal device_changed, detection via last_input_event + joy_connection_changed. (3) TouchGestureManager autoload: tap/double_tap/long_press/swipe_{dir}/pinch/drag signals + map vers InputMap actions. Config via dict (override per-minigame). (4) AdaptivePrompt: component .tscn receives action_name + auto-renders icon correspondant au current_device (xbox A / PS X / KB Space / Touch tap icon). (5) InputConfigPanel .tscn: user remap actions via drag-drop, live preview, save user://input.cfg. (6) InputRemapper: load/save/apply config, override InputMap at runtime. (7) Refactor minigame_base.gd: NEVER reference specific keys, use action names. Remove hardcoded KEY_*. (8) MerlinVisual.prompt_icon(action) helper used across UI. (9) Test matrix: build + play 5 minigames chaque device (keyboard, Xbox, PS5, Android touch, iOS touch emu). Target: zero device-specific code dans gameplay.
